name: HubSpot
description: Monitor HubSpot user access and contact owners for CRM compliance and access management

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to HubSpot as a Super Admin
2. Go to Development (left sidebar)
3. Click Keys > Service keys
4. Click "Create service key" in the top right
5. Name your key (e.g. "CompAI")
6. Click "Add new scope" and select: settings.users.read, crm.objects.owners.read
7. Click Update, then Create
8. Copy the service key and paste it below

Note: If you still see Private Apps instead of Service Keys, go to Development > Legacy apps and create a legacy private app with the same scopes.

credentialFields.label: Service Key
credentialFields.helpText: Create a Service Key in HubSpot > Development > Keys > Service keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews HubSpot users to verify employee access management

checks.name: Contact Information
checks.description: Lists HubSpot CRM contact owners for contact information compliance
